{"problem_standardized_math":"Consider the following data:\n\n\\[\n\\begin{bmatrix}\n0 & -0.235 & 0 & 5.67 & 0 & -0.921 & -6.51 \\\\\n0 & 1.0 & 0 & -1.0 & 0 & -0.168 & 0 & 0 \\\\\n0 & 0 & -1.0 & 0 & -0.196 & 0 & -0.0071 & 0\n\\end{bmatrix},\n\\]\n\nand the nonlinear part defined by\n\n\\[\n\\phi(x)=\n\\begin{bmatrix}\n-0.727x_2x_3 + 8.39x_3x_4 - 684.4x_4x_5 + 63.5x_4x_2\n\\end{bmatrix}.\n\\]"}
